arts.ttl: 'If that was my team': Phil Jagielka suggests he's on Liverpool's side over something that happened v Everton last night
arts.sum: Everton struck late on to salvage a 2-2 draw with Liverpool in a dramatic final Merseyside derby at Goodison Park. Beto opened the scoring for...

arts.ttl: 'Incorrect': Former PGMOL boss says Michael Oliver made a major mistake during Everton vs Liverpool last night
David Moyes makes 'unbelievable' Everton claim after 'magical moment' against Liverpool
arts.sum: Reaction from Everton boss David Moyes after the Merseyside derby at Goodison Park

arts.ttl: Iliman Ndiaye injury update shared after Everton forward left pitch in tears
arts.sum: Reaction from the Blues boss after the Merseyside derby at Goodison Park

arts.ttl: Inside chaos of Goodison Park as angry players leave and hidden Liverpool truth emerges
arts.sum: Liverpool match verdict after the Merseyside derby against Everton at Goodison Park

arts.ttl: Everton and Liverpool sent FA charges warning as punishment truth clear after Merseyside derby
arts.sum: Everton and Liverpool 'failing to control their players' in the Merseyside derby will result in punishment, both clubs have been told

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk accuses Abdoulaye Doucoure of ‘provoking’ Liverpool fans in Merseyside derby chaos
arts.sum: Doucoure and Curtis Jones were sent off amid wild scenes after the Everton player celebrated in front of the away end at Goodison

arts.ttl: David Moyes addresses Liverpool derby 'mayhem' with Arne Slot not allowed to speak
arts.sum: Only one manager was permitted to address the media following a wild end to last Merseyside clash at Goodison Park

arts.ttl: Fans mock Arne Slot after footage emerges of Liverpool boss' reaction to Everton's dramatic late equaliser in the Merseyside derby
arts.sum: In footage of Slot from the moment James Tarkowski denied his side a crucial win in their quest to win the Premier League, Slot can be seen frantically motioning to the fourth official.

arts.ttl: Goodison delivers one last derby gift for Everton fans
arts.sum: The Liverpool supporters had been singing about winning the Premier League title at Goodison Park. Instead, James Tarkowski produced a goal that will, according to David Moyes, be "remembered in history" to earn a dramatic draw for Everton.
